results.title: Việt Nam steps up export to achieve US$550-billion target
results.description: Exports reached $266.52 billion in the first six months, meaning the economy needs to generate roughly $255.7 billion more during the remainder of the year to meet the annual goal.

results.title: DART names Florida transit executive Nathaniel Ford CEO after divided board vote
results.description: DART named Jacksonville transit chief Nathaniel Ford Sr. as its next CEO after a split vote, exposing board divisions as the agency seeks unity.
